# Northwestern Saudi Northwest Saudi Area

**Summary**: The geographic region where the study was conducted.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] focused on the northwestern area of Saudi Arabia for pore pressure prediction.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] Sedimentary basin

## Formations Present

- [[2013-mark|Mark, 2013]] Qalibah formation, Sarah formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Qalibah formation is the source rock for most hydrocarbons in this region. ([[2013-mark|Mark, 2013, p. 103]])
